hero.badge: Open to Intern / Fresher Frontend Roles · Ho Chi Minh City
hero.bio: A practical developer who believes in learning by doing. Currently an IT student at Cao Thang Technical College, specializing in the Next.js ecosystem — React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, backed by a strong data-processing foundation from C# and SQL Server.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Logic-driven developer, continuous learner
about.bio1: Hello! I'm Nguyen Quoc Duong, a Frontend Developer dedicated to building high-performance web applications with seamless user experiences.
about.bio2: Instead of just learning frameworks superficially, I always dive deep into the core mechanics of JavaScript/React and practice writing Clean Code.
about.bio3: Outside of coding, I focus on UI/UX principles, system optimization, and engaging in tech activities to sharpen my teamwork skills.
about.education: Cao Thang Technical College · Information Technology

experience.pageSubtitle: My journey of sharpening practical programming skills through projects and competitions

details: Developed and deployed a Clothing Store Management System using C# WinForms and SQL Server, optimizing database structures and Stored Procedures.
Dived deep into the Next.js/React ecosystem, applying Clean Code principles, robust folder structures, and polished UI/UX designs.
Practiced industry-standard teamwork workflows, version control, and feature-branching strategies using Git and GitHub.
Solved advanced algorithmic problems and optimized data structures using C++.
Sharpened logical thinking and high-pressure problem-solving skills while reinforcing core computer science fundamentals in networking and SQL databases.

projects.pageSubtitle: Things I've built with passion, dedication, and logical thinking

list.title: Clothing Store Management System
list.desc: A desktop application designed to manage inventory, sales revenue, and employee data for a fashion store. Optimized heavy database queries, implemented role-based user authentication, and designed an intuitive WinForms UI.

list.title: Personal Portfolio Website
list.desc: A personal portfolio website showcasing my profile and projects. Fully optimized for SEO, supports dark/light mode toggling, and integrates a seamless internationalization system (Next-intl).
